questions.q: According to new research from April 2026, rice will physically cease to function in traditional growing regions by 2070 when temperatures exceed what heat threshold?
An April 2026 study analyzing five popular AI chatbots for medical accuracy found that which chatbot generated the fewest highly problematic responses?
A groundbreaking April 2026 study revealed that the 'coda' click vocalizations of which ocean-dwelling animal closely parallel the phonetic structure and vowels of human language?
Researchers in April 2026 created an extensive open database revealing that microbes have an almost universal potential to biodegrade plastics, identifying over how many capable microbial proteins?

A 2026 study examining concentrated animal feeding operations found that overall cancer incidence rates were 4% to 8% higher near industrial factory farms in California, Texas, and which other US state?
